summary: Historical Trending feature for Program Intelligence tested successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend pages load correctly with the 'What's Changing' trends section displaying 5 trend cards properly.
critical_code_review_comments: snapshots.py: Clean implementation of snapshot capture with rate-limiting per calendar day (UTC)
compute_trends() correctly compares current metrics to previous snapshot with proper direction logic
seed_historical_snapshots() seeds 3 degraded snapshots (7, 3, 1 days ago) for demo improvement effect
Frontend TrendCard component correctly maps direction to color styling (emerald for improving)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testability
seed_data_creation: Historical snapshots auto-seeded: 3 snapshots at 7, 3, 1 days ago with degraded values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical trending feature complete and tested. program_snapshots collection has 4+ docs (3 seeded + 1 today). API returns 'trends' array with 5 trend objects showing direction, delta, interpretation. Frontend displays 'What's Changing' section with green improving indicators. Rate-limiting prevents duplicate daily snapshots.

trends_array_tests: All 5 trend keys present: pod_health, open_issues, overdue_actions, advocacy_outcomes, follow_up_completion
trend_structure_tests: Each trend has: key, label, current, suffix, delta, direction, interpretation
Direction values are valid: improving, declining, stable, baseline
individual_trend_tests: Pod Health trend: current=18 healthy, delta=+1, direction=improving
Open Issues trend: current=26 issues, delta=-1, direction=improving
Overdue Actions trend: current=18 overdue, delta=-1, direction=improving
Advocacy Pipeline trend: current=6 warm responses, delta=+1, direction=improving
Follow-up Completion trend: current=50%, delta=+1, direction=improving (<= 100 validated)
snapshot_tests: Snapshot count >= 4 after API call (3 seeded + 1 today)
Rate-limiting prevents duplicate snapshots (called twice, count unchanged)
interpretation_tests: Interpretations provide meaningful context for each trend

page_loads: Mission Control: Priority alerts and athletes monitoring visible
Events: Upcoming and past events listed
Program Intelligence: 'What's Changing' section with 5 trend cards
All sections visible: program-health, readiness, event-effectiveness, advocacy-outcomes, support-load
trends_ui: Pod Health card: 18 healthy, +1 delta, green improving indicator
Open Issues card: 26 issues, -1 delta, green improving indicator
Overdue Actions card: 18 overdue, -1 delta, green improving indicator
Advocacy Pipeline card: 6 warm responses, +1 delta, green improving indicator
Follow-up Completion card: 50%, +1 delta, green improving indicator

verified_trending_features: GET /api/program/intelligence returns trends array with 5 trend objects
Each trend has: key, label, current, suffix, delta, direction, interpretation
Directions are: improving, declining, stable, or baseline
3 historical snapshots seeded on startup (7, 3, 1 days ago)
Daily snapshot rate-limiting works (no duplicate per calendar day UTC)
